title: Property Owner Name Change for Right-of-Way Crossing Permission
summary: Water Department presents administrative item changing the property owner name on an existing right-of-way crossing permission previously approved by council. Brief routine item with no questions.
raw_content:
[00:20:56] >> Um item 26 is really just changing the
[00:20:59] name of the owner on this property that
[00:21:02] is requesting permission to cross our
[00:21:05] rightway.
[00:21:07] we came to um previously.
[00:21:09] >> Okay.
[00:21:12] >> Okay.
[00:21:13] >> Thank you.
[00:21:13] >> Thanks, Beth.
[00:21:15] >> Are you all set?
[00:21:16] >> Yes.
[00:21:18] >> Oh, no. Are you going to take that one,
[00:21:19] too? 27
[00:21:20] >> 27.
[00:21:26] >> Good afternoon, councilors. Mary
[00:21:27] Robinson, city engineer. Um this item
processing_notes: Administrative name change only — no substantive policy change
